summary: #80507 remains the live canonical issue for the dry-run formatter mismatch. #80604 is the related narrow PR intended to fix it, but no merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout is planned because this job blocks merge/fix actions and the PR still has failing proof/check gates.

actions.reason: #80507 is the best surviving canonical thread for this root cause; keep it open while the linked PR remains unmerged and blocked by proof/check gates.
#80604 is the relevant candidate fix path for #80507, but it is not merge-ready and merge/fix actions are outside this job's allowed actions.
